name: starknet-btcfi-preflight-checker
description: Read-only PoC readiness checker for Starknet BTCFi flows using strkBTC.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @starknet-btcfi-checker/core && npm run build -w @starknet-btcfi-checker/web
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @starknet-btcfi-checker/core && npm run dev -w @starknet-btcfi-checker/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @starknet-btcfi-checker/core && npm run typecheck -w @starknet-btcfi-checker/web
